case_title: LINDSAY MISENER VS. HYUNJUNG OH HAM

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-21-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-19-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF, "UNSUCCESSFUL/DEFENDANT MOVED". (SERVICE FEE $35.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MISENER, LINDSAY AS TO DEFENDANT HAM, HYUNJUNG OH
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,680.00 FILED BY MISENER, LINDSAY AS TO DEFENDANT HAM, HYUNJUNG OH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-21-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: RICHARD GROTCH. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-21-2013 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
